title: Fix a compilation error in pkg/machine/config.go
body:
Commit c524da252e7220323e27d3f72a00107c165e48c9 has merged the outcome of two individually tested PRs, resulting in a semantic conflict.

[EDIT: that was #21573]

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mtrmac* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [mtrmac] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
New changes are detected. LGTM label has been removed.

The change is to add `[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]`.

https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/21621/checks?check_run_id=21490899704 fails, though, building the HEAD commit. It might be safest to just ignore that failure, rather than disable the check and then risk forgetting to reenable…
Force-pushed to fix main. Closing as this is no longer necessary.
